tasks.title: Fix Jest Configuration for ES Modules
tasks.description: Convert jest.config.js to work with package.json type:module by renaming to jest.config.cjs or converting to ES module format
success_criteria: Jest configuration loads without ReferenceError
npm run test executes successfully
Test runner can locate and run test files

tasks.title: Fix Linter Errors - IMMEDIATE
tasks.description: Fix 0 errors and 0 warnings found in recently edited files: linter-errors.md
success_criteria: All linter errors in edited files resolved
development/linter-errors.md shows no issues for edited files
Code passes linting without warnings or errors

tasks.title: Create Quality Improvement Tasks
tasks.description: Analyze project quality issues and create specific tasks to reach 100% quality for all strikes
tasks.prompt:
Project quality assessment shows issues preventing 100% strike success:

Quality Status:
- Strike 1 (Build): 100%
- Strike 2 (Lint): 70%  
- Strike 3 (Tests): 30%

Issues Found:
- Lint and Code Quality: No ESLint configuration found
- Test Coverage and Success: Tests are failing
- Test Coverage and Success: No coverage script defined

TASK: Analyze these quality gaps and create specific improvement tasks to bring ALL strikes to 100% quality. Create tasks for:
1. Build issues (missing dependencies, build failures, configuration)
2. Code quality issues (lint errors, style violations, code standards)
3. Testing issues (failing tests, missing coverage, test setup)

Insert all improvement tasks BEFORE the strike review tasks. Strikes should always remain last in the task list.
success_criteria: All quality issues identified and analyzed
Specific improvement tasks created for each quality gap
Tasks properly prioritized and ordered before strikes
Clear path to 100% quality established

tasks.title: Fix DI Circular Dependency Issues in Core Package Tests
tasks.description: Resolve circular dependency between Logger and InstanceSettings that is preventing multiple test suites from running. This affects ExecuteSingleContext, WebhookContext, TriggerContext, ExecuteContext, LoadOptionsContext, SupplyDataContext, HookContext, and PollContext tests.
success_criteria: All node execution context tests can initialize without DI circular dependency errors
Logger and InstanceSettings dependency cycle resolved
Test suites run without instantiation failures

tasks.title: Fix AWS SDK Type Issues in Object Store Service
tasks.description: Resolve TypeScript compilation errors in object-store.service.ee.ts where AWS SDK _Object type does not have expected properties like key, causing test compilation failures.
success_criteria: AWS SDK types properly imported and used
Object store tests compile without TypeScript errors
Property access on _Object type resolved

tasks.title: Fix Core Package Logic Errors in Tests
tasks.description: Fix specific test logic failures including run-data-utils negative index handling, request helper function error handling, and file system helper function tests.
success_criteria: getNextExecutionIndex handles negative values correctly
Request helper function error handling tests pass
File system helper function tests pass
All core logic test assertions align with implementation

tasks.title: Fix Get Input Connection Data Test Suite
tasks.description: Resolve the massive test failure in get-input-connection-data.test.ts affecting all AI-related connection types (ai_agent, ai_chain, ai_document, etc.). This involves 96 failing tests.
success_criteria: All AI connection type tests pass
Input validation logic works correctly
Connection handling for various AI node types resolved
96 failing tests reduced to 0

tasks.title: Fix Type Compatibility Issues in Workflow Execute Tests
tasks.description: Resolve TypeScript type incompatibilities in workflow-execute.test.ts and directory-loader.test.ts related to INodeParameters, IExecuteData, and node type descriptions.
success_criteria: Type assignments between INodeParameters and expected types resolved
Node type description compatibility fixed
Workflow execute tests compile without type errors
Directory loader tests compile without type errors

tasks.title: Fix Backend Common Environment Detection Test Failures
tasks.description: Resolve failing environment detection tests in @n8n/backend-common package related to NODE_ENV handling, case sensitivity, whitespace handling, and edge case scenarios. Multiple tests are failing due to incorrect environment flag logic.
success_criteria: Environment detection logic consistency tests pass
Case sensitivity handling for NODE_ENV values fixed
Whitespace and special character handling in NODE_ENV resolved
Edge cases for null, number, and long NODE_ENV values handled
All backend-common environment tests pass
